ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the image belongs to */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* File size of the image */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the image */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the image (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was last processed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being measured */,
  "measurement_type" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for the measurement */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the measurement */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that processed the measurement */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was processed */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the measurement (e.g., validated, unvalidated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Default unit for the measurement type */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used for the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation type */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that processed the annotation */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was processed */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the annotation (e.g., validated, unvalidated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotation_type FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_type") REFERENCES annotation_types ("annotation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_types" (
  "annotation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation type */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used for the annotation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being modified */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being modified */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the modification */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being referenced */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being referenced */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of external data source */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., literature, protocol) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the external data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
